nasb.text: Thus he turned the hearts of all the men of Judah as one man, so that they sent word to the king, saying, “Return, you and all your servants.”

esv.text: And he swayed the heart of all the men of Judah as one man, so that they sent word to the king, “Return, both you and all your servants.”

cnv.text: 這樣，大衛挽回了猶大眾人的心，好像一人的心。於是他們差派人去見王，說：“請你和你的眾臣僕都回來！”

ccb.text: 王的这番话打动了所有犹大人的心，他们派人去请王和王的臣仆回来。
